title: Tinus obovata
taxonomy: Tinus obovata is classified under the family of plants known as Cupressaceae, which includes cedars, cypresses, and junipers. This family is further divided into the genus Cupressus for some species, but the specific classification for Tinus obovata places it within the genus, Tinus. The genus Tinus is a small group of evergreen coniferous trees. More specifically, the species obovata is often referred to as a small tree or shrub within the genus Tinus. Further classification would require more detailed research into the botanical classification of Tinus obovata.
